picks.reasoning: QPR just beat Leicester 3-1 at the King Power — that's the kind of result that tells you a team is in form and full of confidence. Back at home against a Portsmouth side sitting in the relegation zone, Ladbrokes are giving us 2.80 on the home side which implies only a 36% chance. We think QPR win this closer to 44% of the time. The value is clear.

picks.match: Brighton and Hove Albion vs Liverpool
picks.reasoning: Liverpool remain one of the EPL's elite sides this season, and Brighton's recent form has been poor — they lost to Sunderland just a week ago. Ladbrokes have underpriced Liverpool's away win probability; at 2.15 with a true estimate of 54%, this is a clear 7.5% edge. Liverpool have the quality and motivation to take three points here.

Norwich are one of the better-run clubs in the Championship with genuine promotion ambitions. Charlton have just filed accounts showing a £16.8m loss — financial pressure rarely helps team morale or squad depth. At 2.30 with Ladbrokes only pricing Norwich at 43.5% for an away win, there's 6.5% of edge available here from a team that should be winning this game more often than not.
